reviewer: agent (content curation delegated by owner 2026-07-12); owner veto pending publication
selection_principles: Evidence-forward: 16 data + 6 proxy + 2 reflection-only. 22 of 24 cards can support recommendation reasons, weighted toward directory/scorecard evidence (~100% pool coverage) and the highest-coverage CDS fields from the Milestone 0 spike (study abroad 280 schools, double major 270, internships 260, housing 246, undergrad research 245).
Every one of the 11 library groups is represented, so the sort forces prioritization across domains (PRD 026 §2).

Two deliberate tension pairs — big-school-energy/small-school-known and city-as-campus/quiet-setting — separated in display order; unipolar keys mean sorting both Essential is allowed and reconciles through matchers.
Two reflection-only cards earn slots on reflection value: collaborative-culture (the most-asked unmeasurable culture question) and outdoors-access (high salience, and scenario-corpus-exercised).
display_order interleaves groups so no two consecutive cards share one; the order is versioned, not shuffled at runtime, keeping sessions reproducible.

included.explore-before-major: The product-thesis card; IPEDS breadth evidence covers the whole pool.
included.combine-interests: Resonant multi-interest framing; double major is the 2nd-highest-coverage E1 field (270).
included.discussion-classes: Core small-vs-large class experience; CDS I-3 proxy.
included.professors-know-me: Gallup Big Six ('a professor who cared'); the PRD's canonical proxy card.
included.early-research: Big Six; newly evidence-backed via E.117 (245 schools).
included.internship-credit: Big Six ('work connected to class'); E1 coverage 260.
included.walkable-town: Counselor-validated top fit factor; locale proxy.
included.outdoors-access: Reflection-only, but high-salience and exercised by the scenario corpus.
included.weekend-city-access: Bridges the city/quiet tension; derivable metro distance.
included.residential-campus: Core campus-life signal; F1 housing coverage 246.
included.greek-scene: Polarizing by design — sorts strongly into Essential or Not for me; F1 rates.
included.arts-scene: Big Six extracurricular engagement, non-athletic flavor; F1 activities checklist.
included.collaborative-culture: The most-asked unmeasurable culture question; reflection gold.
included.background-diversity: People dimension; CDS B2 composition evidence.
included.need-aid-strength: Family-critical; scorecard net-price evidence covers ~the whole pool.
included.graduate-low-debt: Distinct debt lens on affordability; scorecard evidence.
included.students-return: Momentum signal students understand; retention evidence.
included.four-year-finish: The outcome families actually budget around; grad-rate evidence.

excluded_to_library.pivot-without-transfer: Same evidence family and student instinct as explore-before-major.
excluded_to_library.honors-path: Real but elite-flavored and narrower than the deck's academic slots allow.
excluded_to_library.faculty-in-my-field: Better served by the interest-concept reflection step than a sort card.
excluded_to_library.independent-study: Lower salience than the three experiential picks.
excluded_to_library.teacher-certification: Niche; surfaces better as a path in the ontology later.
excluded_to_library.classic-campus: Reflection-only aesthetics; loses the place-slot contest.
excluded_to_library.warm-climate: One climate/geo reflection card max; outdoors-access won the slot.
excluded_to_library.four-seasons: Mirror of warm-climate; same budget decision.
excluded_to_library.airport-access: Weakest city-access card; radius handles most of it.
excluded_to_library.weekend-vitality: Same evidence as residential-campus; redundant in a 24-card deck.
excluded_to_library.club-sports: Lost the activities-checklist slot to arts-scene (distinct audience).
excluded_to_library.faith-life: Load-bearing for a subset; better surfaced via reflection chips than a universal deck slot — revisit for deck v2.
excluded_to_library.politically-engaged: Polarizing slot already spent on greek-scene and big-game-days.
excluded_to_library.geographic-mix: People slot went to background-diversity (broader axis).
excluded_to_library.first-gen-common: Pell proxy is thin; revisit with better evidence.
excluded_to_library.merit-scholarships: Affordability slots went to need-aid + debt; merit is a strong v2 candidate for no-need families.
excluded_to_library.career-track-record: Outcomes slots went to retention + four-year finish.
